title: pod-log-preserver values
description: Install-time validation of the chart values, checked by Helm at template/lint/install time. It is a fast first line of defense against typos and out-of-range inputs before they reach the cluster; the binary re-validates its own numeric config at startup and fails fast (spec §5.4). additionalProperties:false is applied where an unknown key is almost certainly a typo (top level, config, image, hostPaths, updateStrategy); free-form Kubernetes pass-through maps (annotations, labels, securityContext, affinity, ...) stay open.

namespaceFilter.description: Comma-separated glob patterns; empty means all namespaces.

logLevel.description: "debug" or "info"; any other value shows only warn/error (spec §5.4).

metricsPort.description: A bindable TCP port (1..65535). Unlike the env-only interval/age values, metricsPort is also rendered structurally into the container's containerPort and the Prometheus scrape annotation, so an empty string is NOT accepted here — it would emit an invalid empty containerPort while still passing helm lint/template.

preservedLogDBGlob.description: Glob for the fluent-bit tail DBs; empty disables DB-aware cleanup.

hostLogDir.description: Must contain both config.watchDir and config.preserveDir so preservation hardlinks stay on one filesystem.

fluentBitDBDir.description: Directory of the fluent-bit tail DBs, mounted read-write for the WAL -shm wal-index.

positiveIntOrEmpty.description: A positive integer, or an empty string to fall back to the binary default. The binary rejects a non-positive value at startup (spec §5.4).
